title: SYNTHETIC residential-FAR conflict rule B (always in effect)
description: SYNTHETIC fixture (M4-T004 FH-2): the second of two residential_far rules that are simultaneously in effect, independently applicable to district SYNTH, and emit the SAME output (max_synth_far). It carries a DIFFERENT value from rule A on purpose, so a naive picker would mis-evaluate; the detector must instead surface the conflict. Illustrative value; not a Verified determination.

citations.quote: SYNTHETIC (not verbatim from any source): FH-2 conflict rule B.

inputs.name: zoning_district
inputs.description: District governing the lot (scope via applicability).

outputs.name: max_synth_floor_area_sq_ft
outputs.description: SYNTHETIC max floor area = lot area x FAR (rule B).

parameters.name: far_value
parameters.note: SYNTHETIC rule-B FAR (deliberately different from rule A).

limitations: SYNTHETIC FH-2 conflict-detection demonstration; illustrative value; requires official capture + G6 before any use.
